name: Baiying Enhance
description: Sync authorized Baiying digital employee JSON from Redis into OpenClaw and expose Redis-backed resources through baiying_call.

configSchema.description: Unknown keys are tolerated for backward compatibility (deprecated examples, typos in non-critical fields). Prefer documented properties only.

agentConfigDir.description: Deprecated: ignored. Digital employee JSON is loaded from Redis key DIG_EMPLOYEE_{resourceId} using the auth Hash.

executorResourcesDir.description: Deprecated for Baiying resource snapshots: associated resource JSON is loaded from Redis key {BIZTYPE}_{resourceId}.

watchDebounceMs.description: Debounce (ms) for coalescing dig-employee Redis flush triggers and optional initial scan scheduling.

mainParentAgentId.description: Agent id that may spawn managed sub-agents (allowAgents updated).

mergeAllowSpawnForMain.description: Merge managed agent ids into mainParentAgentId subagents.allowAgents.

embedApiKeysFromJson.description: If true, write plaintext api keys from JSON into the active config file (openclaw.json) (not recommended).

envApiKeyTemplate.description: Env var name template for provider apiKey; use {sourceKey} placeholder (default OPENCLAW_BAIYING_{sourceKey}).

workspaceAutoSeed.description: Create ~/.openclaw/workspace-<agentId>/ and seed SOUL.md/AGENTS.md/BYAI_BUSINESS_EXTENSIONS.md/… from JSON after each sync (default true).

workspaceArchiveOnUnauthorized.description: When true (default), move unauthorized managed digital employee workspaces out of OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR so stale prompt/data files are not discoverable under .openclaw.

workspaceArchiveDir.description: Archive root for unauthorized managed workspaces. Absolute paths and ~ are honored; relative paths resolve under the parent of OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR. Default: .baiying-workspaces next to .openclaw.

mainAgentsMdMode.description: How to write main agent AGENTS.md. Default always (overwrite on each seed). Set if_managed_marker or if_missing to avoid clobbering unmarked files; foreign takeover applies only when if_managed_marker.

mainAgentsMdPath.description: Override template file for main AGENTS.md. When unset, uses the template embedded in dist/index.js at build time (source: templates/main-agents.md).

useBundledMainAgentsMd.description: If false, do not use the template embedded in the bundle (set mainAgentsMdPath or mainAgentsMdMode off).

mainWorkspaceAgentsAutoSeed.description: When true (default), seed main workspace AGENTS.md at plugin register and on each sync flush, independent of workspaceAutoSeed.

mainAgentsMdForeignTakeover.description: When true (default), with if_managed_marker, replace a stock AGENTS.md without plugin marker once per workspace (tracked under OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/baiying-enhance/).

defaultProxyUrl.description: Default proxy URL for LLM-proxy agents (integrationType=NONE), e.g. https://lab.iwhalecloud.com/gpt-proxy/v1.

defaultApiKey.description: Default API key for the proxy endpoint.

persistAgentContentIndex.description: Persist per-agent source JSON SHA-256 hashes to avoid full re-sync after gateway restart (default true).

agentContentIndexPath.description: Optional path to the content index file; default is ~/.openclaw/baiying-enhance/agent-content-index-<id>.json.

workspaceSkillAutoEnable.description: Merge user-uploaded workspace skills (skills/<dir>/SKILL.md, using SKILL.md frontmatter name when present) into managed agents.list[].skills alongside JSON relSkills/skills (default true).

workspaceSkillScanIntervalMs.description: Fallback scan interval in milliseconds for workspace skill changes. Set <= 0 to disable periodic scan and rely on fs.watch plus normal sync triggers.

workspaceSkillIncludeMainShared.description: When true, skills uploaded to the main workspace (workspace/skills) are shared into managed sub-agents. Default false: managed agents only auto-load their own workspace skills.

digEmployeeChangeSubscribe.description: Subscribe to Redis Pub/Sub for digital-employee change events. Default true; set false or env BAIYING_DIG_EMPLOYEE_CHANGE_SUBSCRIBE=false to disable.

digEmployeeChangeChannel.description: Redis channel for DigEmployeeChangeEvent JSON (default byai:pub:dig_employee_change; env BAIYING_DIG_EMPLOYEE_CHANGE_CHANNEL overrides when unset).

digEmployeeChangeSubscribeStrictAuth.description: When true (default), ignore Pub/Sub events until dig-employee auth returns a Set of authorized resource ids. Set false to process events without auth filter.

configSyncHotPluginEntriesPrefixes.description: Optional. Extra plugins.entries paths (plugin id or plugins.entries.<id>) to hot-reload when agent sync rewrites openclaw.json; omit to only register this plugin entry. Add entries your sync co-touches (e.g. byai-channel) to avoid full gateway restart.

watchAgentDir.description: Deprecated: directory filesystem watch was removed; value is ignored. Retained so older openclaw.json does not fail validation.
